sentence.chinese: 早期魯凱族沒有創造文字，無法記錄每個人的出生年月日，慶生的活動大概僅在嬰兒剛出生後的兩三天，會辦理簡單的慶賀儀式，用小米煮成乾飯，宴請來參加慶賀的人，如同漢人的蛋糕一樣，之後一直到老的這段期間，不會再有慶生的活動。隨著與漢人的接觸與交流的影響，漸漸有各樣慶祝生日的方式出現。
sentence.ab: ku igayganeana kay Ngudradrekai kadruwa ka paedhaleana ku pacase, lakai makatuma kiruku ku takitulalaka ka caili dramahe si vai, ku akihahagadha ki kyatulalake lau sakatha lu taukitulalake ku daini ku nimakapusala nimakatulrula, twapadudulru ahakai ku becenge waga ku kicega kihagai ahakai ku becenge, pwakane sanaka wakela kihagai ka umase, mahamau ki tangkau ki paihange, pakela lu atahudrawdrangenga, kadruwanga ku kyahahagai ki takitulalaka niyaa. patupalra ikai tangudadedethanengata ki paihange, taikalranenga kay tatupiyaiyanenga kihagai ki kyatulalake.

sentence.chinese: 早期魯凱族社會能活過七旬的族人不多，當孩子們都已經長大成人，父母不再是家中生活的依靠，孩子們會為年老的父母辦理祝壽禮，來感恩老人家勞心勞力的養育之恩，這種感恩老人的禮數，稱為感恩禮或祝壽禮。對魯凱族來說，不僅是一種榮耀，也能藉此表現子女對老邁父母的孝心。
sentence.ab: kay Ngudradrekai ku igayganeana ku wadulru ngilribate ki tahamapitulu ka caili ku umase tabekele, sana atatadradrawnga icengecenge kay lalaalake, ku mahudrawdrange lakai amaninga ku sakatha ku tasaataluwa, ku lalaalake pasikai ki mahudrawdrange paungulu, kyaseasene ku takualriyanelini lwapu pakaadrau kayvai myaiyaikai ka aunga, ikay ki Ngudradrekai kadruwa ka lrigu sikathaa, amani ku sahakaiya ki lalaalake pathingala ku sakiaseasenelini.

sentence.chinese: 從前感恩的禮數，不僅只有父母，有心的晚輩，會依他們一路走來的生命過程中，曾經在他們生活的需求、精神的需求和愛的需求上，伸出援手給予幫助以及付出關心過的長輩，舉行感恩禮。祝壽時家主必須花些時間準備，準備的禮物中一定會有豬及小米做的食品、毛毯及新衣。
sentence.ab: [-AP1-]ku nadruma lu paungulu, kadruwa ka sakatha ku tina si tama, ku sakidremedrema ka lalaalake, singyakai idra tangilribatanelini ikay ki tacekecekelanelini ku nimuhikaiya, ikay ki kidremedremelini ku nimuhikaiya, ikay ki akithalradha ku nimuhikaiya, kudra watalenga ku alrima palribulu kakalithi ka mahudrawdrange, paungulu kyaseasene. kudra pyuwacekecekela ahakai ku mathangelra ku vai padulru, ku nipadulruwa ka hahukudra aitaha ikai ku cinuluwa ka beeke nyahalrevega ka akanea, kacauba si kahingalai.

sentence.chinese: 豬隻是魯凱族社會各種儀禮很重要的牲禮，小米也是魯凱族傳統生活中最重要的食物。凡是部落家族之喜慶宴會或論及婚嫁，均以豬肉及小米作成的食品（尤其是以小米釀酒）為最高禮遇。毛毯是溫暖呵護之意，新衣以縫製的傳統服飾，完整的一整套，誠意更足。
sentence.ab: kay beeke ikay ki Ngudradrekai ki tatumatumananenga amani ku tinukucingalra ka hahukudra, kay becenge miyalri ka makucingalre ka taleke ikay ki Ngudradrekai. ikay ki cekele ku akapehava pangitaleke si atulrevega, kay beeke si nyahabecenga tuakanea(nilringinga kay kabava) amani ku sanianiyangenga ka sapasudalruwa, kay kacauba thalradha ki mahudrawdrange, kay kahingalai niya ku nipusiluwa nipacasa pailrepenge, mwatakelreta ku tapasingikidremedrema.

sentence.chinese: 子女們行祝壽禮，會邀請與自己長輩年齡相仿的部落族人為他們準備禮物，在當日共同接受大家的祝福，也藉此機會，讓長輩們回憶童年往事與青春年華。近年來，原住民的經濟能力，相較於過往提升很多，感恩的禮數也跟著多樣化，晚輩會擺桌宴請部落的族人共同慶賀，場面熱鬧的程度不亞於婚宴。
sentence.ab: kay lalaalake lu paungulu, wadaulu ku silasilanga ki mahudrawdrangelini si pacepe padulru ku saceacebe, ikayidra vayvai lamasiasilange tahumaha ku sasubulrubulruwa sakiyahagai idra kyapakiiluku ka umase, si mapapangulringalringau sa alavavalake sa icengecenge ku tangilribatanelini. kay asasanenga, kay sacekecekela ki lakacalrisiya wasidinga, ku tapiyaiya paungulu la kisilange akabalri makaelaela, kay lalaalake twatakenga si pangitaleke ki kinauwacekela, ku pehava matatingitinga ku pehava lu tulrevege.

sentence.chinese: 聖經也記載：要孝敬父母，使你得福，在地上長壽。感恩孝敬父母不要只是在母親節、父親節和父母生日而已，平日暖心的問候，貼心的小動作，短暫的陪伴，順服的心都足以讓父母欣慰。羊有跪乳之恩，鴉有反哺之義，動物都知道感恩父母，何況是我們人呢！
sentence.ab:
[-AP1-]kay sisiyu wapacase myaikai, musakena ki tina si tama, lasu kisubulrubulru, ikayikai kaumasa lanu kaelrenge ku niyake. kay akiaseasena ki mahudrawdrange kadruwa ka amani ki tatulrisisisiya ki tama si tina ka vai siki takitulalakanelini, sana thingaleta kakalithi kikawhiyahiva kilaelange patupalra liniya, 
[===]
adulruwa pakipasasa ku kidremedremelini, kay kiyu wapidruhu thuthu ki tina ngwalai ku samusaesakene, kay tagaga wathingale pangibilri lwapu kwadu ki mahudrangenga ka tinalini, adrava kay udryudripi wathingale kyaseasene ki mahudrawdrange, haehaebanengata ka umase!
